channel.title: Comments for page "Waiting in the Sky"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Waiting in the Sky"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is truly moving, and pretty in its simplicity.

item.title: Spanish Translation
item.content:encoded: This tale has been translated into Spanish, which you can find here. Thanks to morhadow for doing the translation.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This was unexpectedly moving. I'd become accustomed to thinking of Moon Champion like the Tick - superpowered, entertaining and utterly demented.

You made him into a real hero.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Thank you so very much, Commander. When I read SCP-1233 for the first time, I knew that it had a lot of potential, and I'm very appreciative of your encouragement. I will admit, I didn't receive much in the way of criticism or previews, but now that the Moon Champion trilogy is officially over I think I've gotten a lot more experience, and I'll seek a lot more help in the future. If the time comes where I require your assistance, I'll certainly message you, because you're definitely a favorite author of mine, and you certainly have a lot of faith in me. Once again, thank you, Moon Champion, I'll be back to writing soon.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
so, this has issues. there's some wonky pacing, itchy formatting, some diction things, and other problems scattered through the whole deal.

but goddamn i love your ambition. for the record, this runs directly contrary to my 1233 canon, but honestly, i don't care. despite its flaws, this really feels like it was written with love, and i respect the hell out of it, not just because of its use of my own property, lol.

+1, partially for total bias, partially for being genuine and having a ton of heart. ♥
